required_inputs.name: strategy
required_inputs.description: Active strategy mode, version, and rule caps.

required_inputs.name: safety
required_inputs.description: Allowed actions, daily budget, cooldowns, and trading_allowed flag.

required_inputs.name: recent_decisions
required_inputs.description: Prior agent actions for continuity and mistake avoidance.

required_inputs.name: manual_notes
required_inputs.description: Operator notes that should influence behavior.

required_inputs.name: market_signals
required_inputs.description: Pending check_needed alerts from webhooks or price watcher.

required_inputs.name: usage_budget
required_inputs.description: Daily/monthly spend caps, per-run-type budgets, and remaining budget.

required_inputs.name: intervention_status
required_inputs.description: Triggers requiring operator review or hold-only mode.

required_inputs.name: market_input_bundle
required_inputs.description: Checklist of quotes, indices, volatility proxy, orders, movers, and freshness readiness.

required_inputs.name: recent_news
required_inputs.description: Stored news headlines, earnings, macro events for watchlist symbols.

required_inputs.name: symbol_memory
required_inputs.description: Per-symbol prior decisions, cooldown state, position, P&L, notes, and signals.

required_inputs.name: data_freshness
required_inputs.description: Staleness warnings for quotes, portfolio, runs, and other inputs.

required_inputs.name: portfolio
required_inputs.description: Live account cash and buying power.

required_inputs.name: recent_orders
required_inputs.description: Recent Robinhood order history for reconciliation.

data_sources.name: mta_api
data_sources.description: MTA-Lab API for plan, context, logging, and reconciliation.

scoring_rules.rule: Treat api_context.safety and strategy rules as hard constraints.
In research/paper mode use simulated_buy/simulated_sell; never place_equity_order unless trading_allowed.
After MCP sync, fetch market-inputs; do not analyze until required checklist items are present or explicitly noted as missing.
Before POST /runs, run self-critique against strategy, safety, cooldowns, freshness, symbol memory, and score consistency; include summary in self_critique field.
Before analyzing a symbol, fetch symbol memory and reference prior actions and cooldowns in the decision rationale.
If freshness_checks.ready_for_analysis is false, do not open new positions; hold or skip and cite stale sources.
Produce a decision row for every symbol analyzed, including hold and skip.
Every decision must include scores (technical, news, risk, confidence on 0-1) and action_rationale explaining how scores led to the action.
Do not log buy/simulated_buy on symbols listed in api_context.cooldowns.
In research mode use simulated_buy/simulated_sell with fill_price and amount_usd; never live buy/sell unless safety.trading_allowed.
Before deep analysis, check usage_budget.budget_ok and run_type_budget_usd for this run_type; hold/skip only if daily/monthly exceeded.

stop_conditions.description: When intervention_status.intervention_required is true, follow severity: critical → failed run; high → hold/skip only.
Do not trade if plan or context cannot be loaded.
Only passive actions when kill_switch is true.
Stop if portfolio, quotes, or orders cannot be retrieved.
When market-inputs.ready is false, hold/skip and explain missing checklist items.
Downgrade trade intents to hold/skip if self-critique finds safety or data gaps.
When freshness_checks.ready_for_analysis is false, only hold/skip and note stale sources.
Skip symbols whose memory endpoint fails rather than analyzing without history.
Downgrade to hold/skip rather than violating caps or cooldowns.
When usage_budget daily/monthly exceeded, only hold/skip; note budget in market_summary.
Never call place_equity_order unless mode=live, trading_enabled, and kill_switch=false.
